A //fabrik:http:static tree binds an injectable *httpserver.Server without other routes.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver v0.0.0
)

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver => HTTPSERVERDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"embed"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
)

//fabrik:http:static /static dir=static
//go:embed static
var Static embed.FS

//fabrik:cli:command
func ServeCommand(server *httpserver.Server) *cli.Command {
	return &cli.Command{Name: "serve", Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error { return server.Run(ctx) }}
}
-- shared/static/robots.txt --
User-agent: *
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"io/fs"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var root *cli.Command
	err := func() error {
		// Providers
		// embedded Static, served under /static
		sharedStatic, err := fs.Sub(shared.Static, "static")
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Handle("/static/", http.StripPrefix("/static", http.FileServerFS(sharedStatic)))

		root = &cli.Command{
			Name: "app",
			Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
				shared.ServeCommand(httpserver.New(r, nil)),
			},
		}
		return nil
	}()
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			return 130
		}
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
